product.name: ArAir Mesh BB
product.familyDescriptorPl: Dzianiny dystansowe 3D na siedziska i obuwie
product.familyDescriptorEn: 3D spacer mesh for seating and footwear
product.specLine: 250 g/m², 100% Polyester, Hard Air Mesh Fabric
descriptions: 100% polyester, 250 g/m² 3D warp knitted air mesh fabric.
ArAir Mesh BB fabric due to its 3D warp knitting structure has high suspension function.
It can be used as upholstery mesh for office furniture.
Bulletproof vest application is possible with ArAir Mesh BB fabric.
Suitable for sport and military shoes.
One of the usage of ArAir Mesh BB is shock aboserber in medical.
250 g/m², 100% Polyester, Hard Air Mesh Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: No explicit firefighting or turnout-gear use stated; only general protective wording.
Explicit statement of medical shock-absorber use plus certification to the EN 14683 face-mask standard directly ties the fabric to medical applications.
Explicit mention of possible bulletproof vest use and military shoe suitability provides direct, though somewhat tentative, evidence of military application.
Product description explicitly states suitability for sport shoes, directly indicating a sport-related application.
Fabric is described as upholstery for office furniture and bags, not explicitly for vehicles or vessels.

evidence: Suitable for sport and military shoes.
3D warp knitted spacer mesh with high suspension function
primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly listed as suitable for shoes among its stated applications, and the family descriptor itself positions this as a spacer mesh 'for seating and footwear'. Footwear is a direct, named use and per taxonomy rule 13 footwear fabrics default to footwear-components unless another sector clearly dominates, which is not the case here given the many parallel, equally-weighted uses (upholstery, bag, medical, military, sport).

evidence: It can be used as upholstery mesh for office furniture.
secondary.rationale: Explicit statement of use as upholstery mesh for office furniture supports a genuine, independent secondary application distinct from footwear, per rule 12/19.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Mentioned as shock absorber and EN 14683 mask certified, but this is one of several parallel uses, not the dominant one; treated as weaker evidence than footwear/upholstery.
Bulletproof vest and military shoe use mentioned tentatively ('possible'), not the clearest dominant use.
Sport shoe suitability mentioned but subsumed under footwear-components as the more specific category per rule 13.
No vehicle-specific upholstery mentioned; only office furniture, which is upholstery-interiors not transport.

modelOutput.reviewReason: Product lists many parallel, equally weighted applications (shoes, bags, office upholstery, medical, military, sport) without a clearly dominant one, making the primary/secondary split somewhat ambiguous.

primaryEvidence: Suitable for sport and military shoes.
3D warp knitted spacer mesh with high suspension function
